message:
fix(ci): Increase Metal0 test timeouts to 45min and fix int base validation

- Increase timeout-minutes for core1-6 Metal0 test jobs from 30 to 45
- Fix macos job timeout consistency (30 -> 60 to match step timeout)
- Fix int(string, base) to validate negative base values before casting
  to u8 (was causing compile-time error with base=-909)

The CI was timing out at ~30m15s due to gradually increasing compilation
time. The 45min timeout provides headroom while investigating optimization.

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ jobs:
   test-metal0-core1:
     name: Metal0 @core1 (46 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
-    timeout-minutes: 30
+    timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
@@ -36,12 +36,12 @@ jobs:
           group: "@core1"
           label: "core1"
           os: "linux"
-        timeout-minutes: 30
+        timeout-minutes: 45
